industrial.label: Cash & Equivalents
industrial.description: Amount of cash and cash equivalent. Cash includes, but is not limited to, currency on hand, demand deposit with financial institution, and account with general characteristic of demand deposit. Cash equivalent includes, but is not limited to, short-term, highly liquid investment that is both readily convertible to known amount of cash and so near maturity that it presents insignificant risk of change in value because of change in interest rate.

industrial.label: Restricted Cash
industrial.description: Amount of cash restricted as to withdrawal or usage. Cash includes, but is not limited to, currency on hand, demand deposits with banks or financial institutions, and other accounts with general characteristics of demand deposits.

industrial.label: Short-Term Investments
industrial.description: Amount of investment in marketable security, classified as current.

industrial.label: Note & Lease Receivable
industrial.description: Amortized cost, after allowance for credit loss, of financing receivable classified as current. Excludes net investment in lease.

industrial.label: Accounts Receivable
industrial.description: Amount, after allowance for credit loss, of right to consideration from customer for product sold and service rendered in normal course of business, classified as current.

industrial.label: Vendor Non-trade Receivables
industrial.description: The sum of amounts currently receivable other than from customers. For classified balance sheets, represents the current amount receivable, that is amounts expected to be collected within one year or the normal operating cycle, if longer.

industrial.label: Inventories, net
industrial.description: Amount after valuation and LIFO reserves of inventory expected to be sold, or consumed within one year or operating cycle, if longer.

industrial.label: Prepaid Expenses
industrial.description: Amount of asset related to consideration paid in advance for costs that provide economic benefits within a future period of one year or the normal operating cycle, if longer.

industrial.label: Current Deferred & Refundable Income Taxes
industrial.description: The current portion of the aggregate tax effects as of the balance sheet date of all future tax deductions arising from temporary differences between tax basis and generally accepted accounting principles basis recognition of assets, liabilities, revenues and expenses, which can only be deducted for tax purposes when permitted under enacted tax laws; after deducting the allocated valuation allowance, if any, to reduce such amount to net realizable value. Deferred tax liabilities and assets are classified as current or noncurrent based on the classification of the related asset or liability for financial reporting. A deferred tax liability or asset that is not related to an asset or liability for financial reporting, including deferred tax assets related to carryforwards, are classified according to the expected reversal date of the temporary difference. An unrecognized tax benefit that is directly related to a position taken in a tax year that results in a net operating loss carryforward is presented as a reduction of the related deferred tax asset.

industrial.label: Other Current Assets
industrial.description: Amount of current assets classified as other.

industrial.label: Other Current Nonoperating Assets
industrial.description: Amount of asset related to consideration paid in advance for costs that provide economic benefits in future periods, and amount of other assets that are expected to be realized or consumed within one year or the normal operating cycle, if longer.

industrial.label: Total Current Assets
industrial.description: Amount of asset recognized for present right to economic benefit, classified as current.

industrial.label: Plant, Property & Equipment, gross
industrial.description: Amount, before accumulated depreciation, depletion, and amortization, of property, plant, and equipment. Includes, but is not limited to, land and land improvement; building; machinery and equipment; furniture and fixture; and work of art, historical treasure, or similar asset classified as collection.

industrial.label: Accumulated Depreciation
industrial.description: Amount of accumulated depreciation, depletion, and amortization of property, plant, and equipment. Includes, but is not limited to, land and land improvement; building; machinery and equipment; furniture and fixture; and work of art, historical treasure, or similar asset classified as collection.

industrial.label: Plant, Property, & Equipment, net
industrial.description: Amount, after accumulated depreciation, depletion, and amortization, of property, plant, and equipment. Includes, but is not limited to, land and land improvement; building; machinery and equipment; furniture and fixture; and work of art, historical treasure, or similar asset classified as collection.

industrial.label: Operating Lease, Right-of-Use Asset
industrial.description: Amount of lessee's right to use underlying asset under operating lease.

industrial.label: Finance Lease, Right-of-Use Asset
industrial.description: Amount, after accumulated amortization, of right-of-use asset from finance lease.

industrial.label: Long-Term Investments
industrial.description: Amount of investment in marketable security, classified as noncurrent.

industrial.label: Noncurrent Note & Lease Receivables
industrial.description: Amount, after allowance for credit loss, of financing receivable, classified as noncurrent.

industrial.label: Goodwill
industrial.description: Amount, after accumulated impairment loss, of asset representing future economic benefit arising from other asset acquired in business combination or from joint venture formation or both, that is not individually identified and separately recognized.

industrial.label: Intangible Assets
industrial.description: Amount, after accumulated amortization, of finite- and indefinite-lived intangible assets and capitalized cost for software to be sold, leased, or marketed. Excludes goodwill.

industrial.label: Noncurrent Deferred & Refundable Income Taxes
industrial.description: The noncurrent portion as of the balance sheet date of the aggregate carrying amount of all future tax deductions arising from temporary differences between tax basis and generally accepted accounting principles basis recognition of assets, liabilities, revenues and expenses, which can only be deducted for tax purposes when permitted under enacted tax laws; after the valuation allowance, if any, to reduce such amount to net realizable value. Deferred tax liabilities and assets are classified as current or noncurrent based on the classification of the related asset or liability for financial reporting. A deferred tax liability or asset that is not related to an asset or liability for financial reporting, including deferred tax assets related to carryforwards, is classified according to the expected reversal date of the temporary difference.

industrial.label: Employee Benefit Assets
industrial.description: This represents the entire assets recognized in the balance sheet that are associated with the defined benefit plans.

industrial.label: Other Noncurrent Operating Assets
industrial.description: Amount of noncurrent assets classified as other.

industrial.label: Other Noncurrent Nonoperating Assets
industrial.description: Amount of investments, and noncurrent assets classified as other.

industrial.label: Other Than Fixed Noncurrent Assets
industrial.description: Noncurrent assets other than investments and PP&E.

industrial.label: Total Noncurrent Assets
industrial.description: Sum of the carrying amounts as of the balance sheet date of all assets that are expected to be realized in cash, sold or consumed after one year or beyond the normal operating cycle, if longer.

industrial.label: Total Assets
industrial.description: Amount of asset recognized for present right to economic benefit.

industrial.label: Short-Term Debt
industrial.description: Reflects the total carrying amount as of the balance sheet date of debt having initial terms less than one year or the normal operating cycle, if longer.

industrial.label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt
industrial.description: Amount of long-term debt due within one year or within the normal operating cycle, if longer.

industrial.label: Operating Lease, Liability, Current
industrial.description: Present value of lessee's discounted obligation for lease payments from operating lease, classified as current.

industrial.label: Finance Lease, Liability, Current
industrial.description: Present value of lessee's discounted obligation for lease payments from finance lease, classified as current.

industrial.label: Accounts Payable
industrial.description: Carrying value as of the balance sheet date of liabilities incurred (and for which invoices have typically been received) and payable to vendors for goods and services received that are used in an entity's business. Used to reflect the current portion of the liabilities (due within one year or within the normal operating cycle if longer).

industrial.label: Accrued Expenses
industrial.description: Carrying value as of the balance sheet date of obligations incurred and payable, pertaining to costs that are statutory in nature, are incurred on contractual obligations, or accumulate over time and for which invoices have not yet been received or will not be rendered. Examples include taxes, interest, rent and utilities. Used to reflect the current portion of the liabilities (due within one year or within the normal operating cycle if longer).

industrial.label: Customer Deposits
industrial.description: Carrying amount of liabilities for customer deposits received and held, classified as current. Includes cash received in advance for undelivered goods or services and refundable security deposits.

industrial.label: Dividends Payable
industrial.description: Carrying value as of the balance sheet date of dividends declared but unpaid on equity securities issued by the entity and outstanding.

industrial.label: Current Deferred Revenue
industrial.description: Amount of deferred income and obligation to transfer product and service to customer for which consideration has been received or is receivable, classified as current.

industrial.label: Current Deferred & Payable Income Tax Liabilities
industrial.description: Represents the current portion of deferred tax liabilities, which result from applying the applicable tax rate to net taxable temporary differences pertaining to each jurisdiction to which the entity is obligated to pay income tax. A current taxable temporary difference is a difference between the tax basis and the carrying amount of a current asset or liability in the financial statements prepared in accordance with generally accepted accounting principles. In a classified statement of financial position, an enterprise separates deferred tax liabilities and assets into a current amount and a noncurrent amount. Deferred tax liabilities and assets are classified as current or noncurrent based on the classification of the related asset or liability for financial reporting. A deferred tax liability or asset that is not related to an asset or liability for financial reporting, including deferred tax assets related to carryforwards, is classified according to the expected reversal date of the temporary difference.

industrial.label: Current Employee Benefit Liabilities
industrial.description: Total of the carrying values as of the balance sheet date of obligations incurred through that date and payable for obligations related to services received from employees, such as accrued salaries and bonuses, payroll taxes and fringe benefits. Used to reflect the current portion of the liabilities (due within one year or within the normal operating cycle if longer).

industrial.label: Other Taxes Payable
industrial.description: Carrying value as of the balance sheet date of obligations incurred and payable for statutory income, sales, use, payroll, excise, real, property and other taxes. Used to reflect the current portion of the liabilities (due within one year or within the normal operating cycle if longer).

industrial.label: Other Current Liabilities
industrial.description: Amount of liabilities classified as other, due within one year or the normal operating cycle, if longer.

industrial.label: Other Current Nonoperating Liabilities
industrial.description: Amount of current liabilities from nonoperating activities, classified as other. Includes accrued liabilities and other liabilities not separately disclosed.

industrial.label: Total Current Liabilities
industrial.description: Total obligations incurred as part of normal operations that are expected to be paid during the following twelve months or within one business cycle, if longer.

industrial.label: Long-Term Debt
industrial.description: Amount, after deduction of unamortized premium (discount) and debt issuance cost, of long-term debt classified as noncurrent. Excludes lease obligation.

industrial.label: Capital Lease Obligations
industrial.description: Present value of lessee's discounted obligation for lease payments from finance lease.

industrial.label: Operating Lease, Liability, Noncurrent
industrial.description: Present value of lessee's discounted obligation for lease payments from operating lease, classified as noncurrent.

industrial.label: Asset Retirement Reserve & Litigation Obligation
industrial.description: Noncurrent portion of the carrying amount of a liability for an asset retirement obligation. An asset retirement obligation is a legal obligation associated with the disposal or retirement of a tangible long-lived asset that results from the acquisition, construction or development, or the normal operations of a long-lived asset, except for certain obligations of lessees.

industrial.label: Noncurrent Deferred Revenue
industrial.description: Amount of deferred income and obligation to transfer product and service to customer for which consideration has been received or is receivable, classified as noncurrent.

industrial.label: Noncurrent Deferred & Payable Income Tax Liabilities
industrial.description: Amount, after deferred tax asset, of deferred tax liability attributable to taxable differences with jurisdictional netting.

industrial.label: Noncurrent Employee Benefit Liabilities
industrial.description: Amount of liability, recognized in statement of financial position, for defined benefit pension and other postretirement plans, classified as noncurrent.

industrial.label: Other Noncurrent Operating Liabilities
industrial.description: Amount of liabilities classified as other, due after one year or the normal operating cycle, if longer.

industrial.label: Other Noncurrent Nonoperating Liabilities
industrial.description: Amount of noncurrent liabilities from nonoperating activities, classified as other. Includes deferred income taxes and other liabilities not separately disclosed.

industrial.label: Total Noncurrent Liabilities
industrial.description: Amount of obligation due after one year or beyond the normal operating cycle, if longer.

industrial.label: Total Liabilities
industrial.description: Amount of liability recognized for present obligation requiring transfer or otherwise providing economic benefit to others.

industrial.label: Commitments & Contingencies
industrial.description: Represents the caption on the face of the balance sheet to indicate that the entity has entered into (1) purchase or supply arrangements that will require expending a portion of its resources to meet the terms thereof, and (2) is exposed to potential losses or, less frequently, gains, arising from (a) possible claims against a company's resources due to future performance under contract terms, and (b) possible losses or likely gains from uncertainties that will ultimately be resolved when one or more future events that are deemed likely to occur do occur or fail to occur.

industrial.label: Redeemable NCI - Common
industrial.description: Equity carrying amount of the common stock component of redeemable NCI.

industrial.label: Redeemable NCI - Preferred
industrial.description: Equity carrying amount of the preferred stock component of redeemable NCI.

industrial.label: Redeemable NCI - Other
industrial.description: Equity carrying amount of the other component of redeemable NCI.

industrial.label: Redeemable Noncontrolling Interest
industrial.description: As of the reporting date, the aggregate carrying amount of all noncontrolling interests which are redeemable by the (parent) entity (1) at a fixed or determinable price on a fixed or determinable date, (2) at the option of the holder of the noncontrolling interest, or (3) upon occurrence of an event that is not solely within the control of the (parent) entity. This item includes noncontrolling interest holder's ownership (or holders' ownership) regardless of the type of equity interest (common, preferred, other) including all potential organizational (legal) forms of the investee entity.

industrial.label: Preferred Stock
industrial.description: Aggregate par or stated value of issued nonredeemable preferred stock (or preferred stock redeemable solely at the option of the issuer). This item includes treasury stock repurchased by the entity. Note: elements for number of nonredeemable preferred shares, par value and other disclosure concepts are in another section within stockholders' equity.

industrial.label: Common Stock
industrial.description: Aggregate par or stated value of issued nonredeemable common stock (or common stock redeemable solely at the option of the issuer). This item includes treasury stock repurchased by the entity. Note: elements for number of nonredeemable common shares, par value and other disclosure concepts are in another section within stockholders' equity.

industrial.label: Additional Paid-In Capital
industrial.description: Value received from shareholders in common stock-related transactions that are in excess of par value or stated value and amounts received from other stock-related transactions. Includes only common stock transactions (excludes preferred stock transactions). May be called contributed capital, capital in excess of par, capital surplus, or paid-in capital.

industrial.label: Retained Earnings
industrial.description: Amount of accumulated undistributed earnings (deficit).

industrial.label: Treasury Stock
industrial.description: The amount allocated to treasury stock. Treasury stock is common and preferred shares of an entity that were issued, repurchased by the entity, and are held in its treasury.

industrial.label: Accumulated Other Comprehensive Income / (Loss)
industrial.description: Amount, after tax, of accumulated increase (decrease) in equity from transaction and other event and circumstance from nonowner source.

industrial.label: Other Equity Adjustments
industrial.description: This element represents movements included in the statement of changes in stockholders' equity which are not separately disclosed or provided for elsewhere in the taxonomy.

industrial.label: Total Common Equity
industrial.description: Amount of equity (deficit) attributable to parent. Excludes temporary equity and equity attributable to noncontrolling interest.

industrial.label: Total Preferred & Common Equity
industrial.description: Amount of equity (deficit) attributable to parent. Excludes temporary equity and equity attributable to noncontrolling interest.

industrial.label: Noncontrolling Interest
industrial.description: Amount of equity (deficit) attributable to noncontrolling interest. Excludes temporary equity.

industrial.label: Total Equity & Noncontrolling Interests
industrial.description: Amount of equity (deficit) attributable to parent and noncontrolling interest. Excludes temporary equity.

industrial.label: Temporary Equity Attributable to Parent
industrial.description: Carrying amount of temporary equity attributable to parent.

industrial.label: Temporary Equity
industrial.description: Carrying amount of the equity component of securities that are redeemable.

industrial.label: Total Liabilities & Shareholders' Equity
industrial.description: Amount of liabilities and equity items, including the portion of equity attributable to noncontrolling interests, if any.

financial.label: Cash and Due from Banks
financial.description: Amount of cash and cash equivalent. Cash includes, but is not limited to, currency on hand, demand deposit with financial institution, and account with general characteristic of demand deposit. Cash equivalent includes, but is not limited to, short-term, highly liquid investment that is both readily convertible to known amount of cash and so near maturity that it presents insignificant risk of change in value because of change in interest rate.

financial.label: Restricted Cash
financial.description: Amount of cash restricted as to withdrawal or usage. Cash includes, but is not limited to, currency on hand, demand deposits with banks or financial institutions, and other accounts with general characteristics of demand deposits.

financial.label: Short-term Investments
financial.description: Amount of investments including trading securities, available-for-sale securities, held-to-maturity securities, and short-term investments classified as other and current.

financial.label: Federal Funds Sold
financial.description: Includes: (1) the amount outstanding of funds lent to other depository institutions, securities brokers, or securities dealers in the form of Federal Funds sold; for example, immediately available funds lent under agreements or contracts that mature in one business day or roll over under a continuing contract, regardless of the nature of the transaction or the collateral involved, excluding overnight lending for commercial and industrial purposes. Also include Federal Funds sold under agreements to resell on a gross basis, excluding (1) sales of term Federal Funds, (2) due bills representing purchases of securities or other assets by the reporting bank that have not yet been delivered and similar instruments, (3) resale agreements that mature in more than one business day involving assets other than securities, and (4) yield maintenance dollar repurchase agreements (Federal Funds Sold) and (2) the dollar amount outstanding of funds lent in the form of security resale agreements regardless of maturity, if the agreement requires the bank to resell the identical security purchased or a security that meets the definition of substantially the same in the case of a dollar roll. Also include purchases of participations in pools of securities, regardless of maturity (Securities Purchased Under Agreements to Re-sell).

financial.label: Interest Bearing Deposits at Other Banks
financial.description: For banks and other depository institutions (including Federal Reserve Banks, if applicable): Interest-bearing deposits in other financial institutions for relatively short periods of time including, for example, certificates of deposits, which are presented separately from cash on the balance sheet.

financial.label: Time Deposits Placed and Other Short-Term Investments
financial.description: Amount of time deposit liabilities, including certificates of deposit.

financial.label: Trading Account Securities
financial.description: Amount of investment in debt security measured at fair value with change in fair value recognized in net income (trading) and investment in equity security measured at fair value with change in fair value recognized in net income (FV-NI).

financial.label: Loans and Leases
financial.description: Amortized cost excluding accrued interest, before allowance for credit loss, of financing receivable. Excludes net investment in lease.

financial.label: Allowance for Loan and Lease Losses
financial.description: Amount of allowance for credit loss on financing receivable. Excludes allowance for financing receivable covered under loss sharing agreement.

financial.label: Loans and Leases, Net of Allowance
financial.description: Amortized cost excluding accrued interest, after allowance for credit loss, of financing receivable. Excludes net investment in lease.

financial.label: Loans Held for Sale
financial.description: Amount before allowance and after deduction of deferred interest and fees, unamortized costs and premiums and discounts from face amounts, of loans and leases held in portfolio, including but not limited to, commercial and consumer loans. Excludes loans and leases covered under loss sharing agreements.

financial.label: Accrued Investment Income
financial.description: Interest, dividends, rents, ancillary and other revenues earned but not yet received by the entity on its investments.

financial.label: Accounts Receivable
financial.description: Amount due from customers for goods/services in the normal course of business.

financial.label: Customer and Other Receivables
financial.description: Amount, after allowance for credit loss, of right to consideration from customer for product sold and service rendered in normal course of business.

financial.label: Premises and Equipment, Net
financial.description: Amount, after accumulated depreciation, depletion, and amortization, of property, plant, and equipment. Includes, but is not limited to, land and land improvement; building; machinery and equipment; furniture and fixture; and work of art, historical treasure, or similar asset classified as collection.

financial.label: Property, Plant and Equipment, Net
financial.description: Amount after accumulated depreciation, depletion and amortization of physical assets.

financial.label: Operating Lease, Right-of-Use Asset
financial.description: Amount of lessee's right to use underlying asset under operating lease.

financial.label: Finance Lease, Right-of-Use Asset
financial.description: Amount, after accumulated amortization, of right-of-use asset from finance lease.

financial.label: Mortgage Servicing Rights
financial.description: Fair value of an asset representing net future revenue from contractually specified servicing fees, late charges, and other ancillary revenues, in excess of future costs related to servicing arrangements.

financial.label: Long-term Investments
financial.description: Amount of long-term investments including equity method investees and available for sale securities.

financial.label: Deferred Acquisition Cost
financial.description: Amount of deferred policy acquisition cost capitalized on contract remaining in force.

financial.label: Separate Account Business Assets
financial.description: Amount of asset at fair value held for benefit of separate account policyholder.

financial.label: Goodwill
financial.description: Amount, after accumulated impairment loss, of asset representing future economic benefit arising from other asset acquired in business combination or from joint venture formation or both, that is not individually identified and separately recognized.

financial.label: Intangible Assets
financial.description: Amount, after accumulated amortization, of finite- and indefinite-lived intangible assets and capitalized cost for software to be sold, leased, or marketed. Excludes goodwill.

financial.label: Other Assets
financial.description: Amount of assets classified as other.

financial.label: Other Than Fixed Noncurrent Assets
financial.description: Noncurrent assets other than investments and PP&E.

financial.label: Total Assets
financial.description: Amount of asset recognized for present right to economic benefit.

financial.label: Non-Interest Bearing Deposits
financial.description: The aggregate amount of all domestic and foreign noninterest-bearing deposits liabilities held by the entity.

financial.label: Interest Bearing Deposits
financial.description: The aggregate of all domestic and foreign interest-bearing deposit liabilities.

financial.label: Federal Funds Purchased and Securities Sold
financial.description: Amount after offset of short term borrowing where a bank borrows, at the federal funds rate, from another bank and securities that an entity sells and agrees to repurchase at a specified date for a specified price.

financial.label: Short-Term Debt
financial.description: Reflects the total carrying amount as of the balance sheet date of debt having initial terms less than one year or the normal operating cycle, if longer.

financial.label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt
financial.description: Amount of long-term debt due within one year or within the normal operating cycle, if longer.

financial.label: Operating Lease, Liability, Current
financial.description: Present value of lessee's discounted obligation for lease payments from operating lease, classified as current.

financial.label: Finance Lease, Liability, Current
financial.description: Present value of lessee's discounted obligation for lease payments from finance lease, classified as current.

financial.label: Bankers Acceptance Outstanding
financial.description: Amount of short-term, negotiable time drafts drawn on and accepted by a financial institution. Bankers acceptances are a bank's promise to pay to the holder of the draft a stated amount on a specified date.

financial.label: Accounts Payable
financial.description: Amount of obligations incurred and payable for goods and services received.

financial.label: Accrued Interest Payable
financial.description: Carrying value as of the balance sheet date of [accrued] interest payable on all forms of debt, including trade payables, that has been incurred and is unpaid. Used to reflect the current portion of the liabilities (due within one year or within the normal operating cycle if longer).

financial.label: Other Short-Term Payables
financial.description: Amount of borrowings classified as other, maturing within one year or the normal operating cycle, if longer.

financial.label: Long-Term Debt
financial.description: Amount, after deduction of unamortized premium (discount) and debt issuance cost, of long-term debt classified as noncurrent. Excludes lease obligation.

financial.label: Capital Lease Obligations
financial.description: Present value of lessee's discounted obligation for lease payments from finance lease.

financial.label: Operating Lease, Liability, Noncurrent
financial.description: Present value of lessee's discounted obligation for lease payments from operating lease, classified as noncurrent.

financial.label: Claims and Claim Expense
financial.description: The amount needed to reflect the estimated ultimate cost of settling claims relating to insured events that have occurred on or before the balance sheet date, whether or not reported to the insurer at that date.

financial.label: Future Policy Benefits
financial.description: Amount, before effect of reinsurance, of present value of future benefit to be paid to or on behalf of policyholder and related expense less present value of future net premium receivable under insurance contract.

financial.label: Unearned Premiums Liability
financial.description: Carrying amount of premiums written on insurance contracts that have not been earned as of the balance sheet date.

financial.label: Policy Holder Funds
financial.description: Amount due to policyholders for funds held that are returnable under the terms of insurance contracts, classified as other.

financial.label: Participating Policy Holder Equity
financial.description: Amount due to policyholders for funds held that are returnable under the terms of insurance contracts, classified as other.

financial.label: Separate Account Business Liabilities
financial.description: Amount of liability for variable contract in which all or portion of contract holder's funds is allocated to specific separate account and supported by assets held in separate account.

financial.label: Other Long-Term Liabilities
financial.description: Amount of liabilities classified as other, due after one year or the normal operating cycle, if longer.

financial.label: Total Liabilities
financial.description: Amount of liability recognized for present obligation requiring transfer or otherwise providing economic benefit to others.

financial.label: Commitments & Contingencies
financial.description: Represents the caption on the face of the balance sheet to indicate that the entity has entered into (1) purchase or supply arrangements that will require expending a portion of its resources to meet the terms thereof, and (2) is exposed to potential losses or, less frequently, gains, arising from (a) possible claims against a company's resources due to future performance under contract terms, and (b) possible losses or likely gains from uncertainties that will ultimately be resolved when one or more future events that are deemed likely to occur do occur or fail to occur.

financial.label: Redeemable NCI - Common
financial.description: Equity carrying amount of the common stock component of redeemable NCI.

financial.label: Redeemable NCI - Preferred
financial.description: Equity carrying amount of the preferred stock component of redeemable NCI.

financial.label: Redeemable NCI - Other
financial.description: Equity carrying amount of the other component of redeemable NCI.

financial.label: Redeemable Noncontrolling Interest
financial.description: As of the reporting date, the aggregate carrying amount of all noncontrolling interests which are redeemable by the (parent) entity (1) at a fixed or determinable price on a fixed or determinable date, (2) at the option of the holder of the noncontrolling interest, or (3) upon occurrence of an event that is not solely within the control of the (parent) entity. This item includes noncontrolling interest holder's ownership (or holders' ownership) regardless of the type of equity interest (common, preferred, other) including all potential organizational (legal) forms of the investee entity.

financial.label: Preferred Stock
financial.description: Aggregate par or stated value of issued nonredeemable preferred stock (or preferred stock redeemable solely at the option of the issuer). This item includes treasury stock repurchased by the entity. Note: elements for number of nonredeemable preferred shares, par value and other disclosure concepts are in another section within stockholders' equity.

financial.label: Common Stock
financial.description: Aggregate par or stated value of issued nonredeemable common stock (or common stock redeemable solely at the option of the issuer). This item includes treasury stock repurchased by the entity. Note: elements for number of nonredeemable common shares, par value and other disclosure concepts are in another section within stockholders' equity.

financial.label: Additional Paid-In Capital
financial.description: Value received from shareholders in common stock-related transactions that are in excess of par value or stated value and amounts received from other stock-related transactions. Includes only common stock transactions (excludes preferred stock transactions). May be called contributed capital, capital in excess of par, capital surplus, or paid-in capital.

financial.label: Retained Earnings
financial.description: Amount of accumulated undistributed earnings (deficit).

financial.label: Treasury Stock
financial.description: The amount allocated to treasury stock. Treasury stock is common and preferred shares of an entity that were issued, repurchased by the entity, and are held in its treasury.

financial.label: Accumulated Other Comprehensive Income / (Loss)
financial.description: Amount, after tax, of accumulated increase (decrease) in equity from transaction and other event and circumstance from nonowner source.

financial.label: Other Equity Adjustments
financial.description: This element represents movements included in the statement of changes in stockholders' equity which are not separately disclosed or provided for elsewhere in the taxonomy.

financial.label: Total Common Equity
financial.description: Amount of equity (deficit) attributable to parent. Excludes temporary equity and equity attributable to noncontrolling interest.

financial.label: Total Preferred & Common Equity
financial.description: Amount of equity (deficit) attributable to parent. Excludes temporary equity and equity attributable to noncontrolling interest.

financial.label: Noncontrolling Interest
financial.description: Amount of equity (deficit) attributable to noncontrolling interest. Excludes temporary equity.

financial.label: Total Equity & Noncontrolling Interests
financial.description: Amount of equity (deficit) attributable to parent and noncontrolling interest. Excludes temporary equity.

financial.label: Temporary Equity Attributable to Parent
financial.description: Carrying amount of temporary equity attributable to parent.

financial.label: Temporary Equity
financial.description: Carrying amount of the equity component of securities that are redeemable.

financial.label: Total Liabilities & Shareholders' Equity
financial.description: Amount of liabilities and equity items, including the portion of equity attributable to noncontrolling interests, if any.

diversified.label: Total Current Assets
diversified.description: Amount of asset recognized for present right to economic benefit, classified as current.

diversified.label: Other Than Fixed Noncurrent Assets
diversified.description: Noncurrent assets other than investments and PP&E.

diversified.label: Total Noncurrent Assets
diversified.description: Sum of the carrying amounts as of the balance sheet date of all assets that are expected to be realized in cash, sold or consumed after one year or beyond the normal operating cycle, if longer.

diversified.label: Cash & Equivalents
diversified.description: Amount of cash and cash equivalent. Cash includes, but is not limited to, currency on hand, demand deposit with financial institution, and account with general characteristic of demand deposit. Cash equivalent includes, but is not limited to, short-term, highly liquid investment that is both readily convertible to known amount of cash and so near maturity that it presents insignificant risk of change in value because of change in interest rate.

diversified.label: Restricted Cash
diversified.description: Amount of cash restricted as to withdrawal or usage. Cash includes, but is not limited to, currency on hand, demand deposits with banks or financial institutions, and other accounts with general characteristics of demand deposits.

diversified.label: Short-Term Investments
diversified.description: Amount of investment in marketable security, classified as current.

diversified.label: Note & Lease Receivable
diversified.description: Amortized cost, after allowance for credit loss, of financing receivable classified as current. Excludes net investment in lease.

diversified.label: Accounts Receivable
diversified.description: Amount, after allowance for credit loss, of right to consideration from customer for product sold and service rendered in normal course of business, classified as current.

diversified.label: Vendor Non-trade Receivables
diversified.description: The sum of amounts currently receivable other than from customers. For classified balance sheets, represents the current amount receivable, that is amounts expected to be collected within one year or the normal operating cycle, if longer.

diversified.label: Inventories, net
diversified.description: Amount after valuation and LIFO reserves of inventory expected to be sold, or consumed within one year or operating cycle, if longer.

diversified.label: Prepaid Expenses
diversified.description: Amount of asset related to consideration paid in advance for costs that provide economic benefits within a future period of one year or the normal operating cycle, if longer.

diversified.label: Current Deferred & Refundable Income Taxes
diversified.description: The current portion of the aggregate tax effects as of the balance sheet date of all future tax deductions arising from temporary differences between tax basis and generally accepted accounting principles basis recognition of assets, liabilities, revenues and expenses, which can only be deducted for tax purposes when permitted under enacted tax laws; after deducting the allocated valuation allowance, if any, to reduce such amount to net realizable value. Deferred tax liabilities and assets are classified as current or noncurrent based on the classification of the related asset or liability for financial reporting. A deferred tax liability or asset that is not related to an asset or liability for financial reporting, including deferred tax assets related to carryforwards, are classified according to the expected reversal date of the temporary difference. An unrecognized tax benefit that is directly related to a position taken in a tax year that results in a net operating loss carryforward is presented as a reduction of the related deferred tax asset.

diversified.label: Other Current Assets
diversified.description: Amount of current assets classified as other.

diversified.label: Other Current Nonoperating Assets
diversified.description: Amount of asset related to consideration paid in advance for costs that provide economic benefits in future periods, and amount of other assets that are expected to be realized or consumed within one year or the normal operating cycle, if longer.

diversified.label: Plant, Property & Equipment, gross
diversified.description: Amount, before accumulated depreciation, depletion, and amortization, of property, plant, and equipment. Includes, but is not limited to, land and land improvement; building; machinery and equipment; furniture and fixture; and work of art, historical treasure, or similar asset classified as collection.

diversified.label: Accumulated Depreciation
diversified.description: Amount of accumulated depreciation, depletion, and amortization of property, plant, and equipment. Includes, but is not limited to, land and land improvement; building; machinery and equipment; furniture and fixture; and work of art, historical treasure, or similar asset classified as collection.

diversified.label: Plant, Property, & Equipment, net
diversified.description: Amount, after accumulated depreciation, depletion, and amortization, of property, plant, and equipment. Includes, but is not limited to, land and land improvement; building; machinery and equipment; furniture and fixture; and work of art, historical treasure, or similar asset classified as collection.

diversified.label: Operating Lease, Right-of-Use Asset
diversified.description: Amount of lessee's right to use underlying asset under operating lease.

diversified.label: Finance Lease, Right-of-Use Asset
diversified.description: Amount, after accumulated amortization, of right-of-use asset from finance lease.

diversified.label: Long-Term Investments
diversified.description: Amount of investment in marketable security, classified as noncurrent.

diversified.label: Noncurrent Note & Lease Receivables
diversified.description: Amount, after allowance for credit loss, of financing receivable, classified as noncurrent.

diversified.label: Goodwill
diversified.description: Amount, after accumulated impairment loss, of asset representing future economic benefit arising from other asset acquired in business combination or from joint venture formation or both, that is not individually identified and separately recognized.

diversified.label: Intangible Assets
diversified.description: Amount, after accumulated amortization, of finite- and indefinite-lived intangible assets and capitalized cost for software to be sold, leased, or marketed. Excludes goodwill.

diversified.label: Noncurrent Deferred & Refundable Income Taxes
diversified.description: The noncurrent portion as of the balance sheet date of the aggregate carrying amount of all future tax deductions arising from temporary differences between tax basis and generally accepted accounting principles basis recognition of assets, liabilities, revenues and expenses, which can only be deducted for tax purposes when permitted under enacted tax laws; after the valuation allowance, if any, to reduce such amount to net realizable value. Deferred tax liabilities and assets are classified as current or noncurrent based on the classification of the related asset or liability for financial reporting. A deferred tax liability or asset that is not related to an asset or liability for financial reporting, including deferred tax assets related to carryforwards, is classified according to the expected reversal date of the temporary difference.

diversified.label: Employee Benefit Assets
diversified.description: This represents the entire assets recognized in the balance sheet that are associated with the defined benefit plans.

diversified.label: Other Noncurrent Operating Assets
diversified.description: Amount of noncurrent assets classified as other.

diversified.label: Other Noncurrent Nonoperating Assets
diversified.description: Amount of investments, and noncurrent assets classified as other.

diversified.label: Total Assets
diversified.description: Amount of asset recognized for present right to economic benefit.

diversified.label: Total Current Liabilities
diversified.description: Total obligations incurred as part of normal operations that are expected to be paid during the following twelve months or within one business cycle, if longer.

diversified.label: Total Noncurrent Liabilities
diversified.description: Amount of obligation due after one year or beyond the normal operating cycle, if longer.

diversified.label: Short-Term Debt
diversified.description: Reflects the total carrying amount as of the balance sheet date of debt having initial terms less than one year or the normal operating cycle, if longer.

diversified.label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt
diversified.description: Amount of long-term debt due within one year or within the normal operating cycle, if longer.

diversified.label: Operating Lease, Liability, Current
diversified.description: Present value of lessee's discounted obligation for lease payments from operating lease, classified as current.

diversified.label: Finance Lease, Liability, Current
diversified.description: Present value of lessee's discounted obligation for lease payments from finance lease, classified as current.

diversified.label: Accounts Payable
diversified.description: Carrying value as of the balance sheet date of liabilities incurred (and for which invoices have typically been received) and payable to vendors for goods and services received that are used in an entity's business. Used to reflect the current portion of the liabilities (due within one year or within the normal operating cycle if longer).

diversified.label: Accrued Expenses
diversified.description: Carrying value as of the balance sheet date of obligations incurred and payable, pertaining to costs that are statutory in nature, are incurred on contractual obligations, or accumulate over time and for which invoices have not yet been received or will not be rendered. Examples include taxes, interest, rent and utilities. Used to reflect the current portion of the liabilities (due within one year or within the normal operating cycle if longer).

diversified.label: Customer Deposits
diversified.description: Carrying amount of liabilities for customer deposits received and held, classified as current. Includes cash received in advance for undelivered goods or services and refundable security deposits.

diversified.label: Dividends Payable
diversified.description: Carrying value as of the balance sheet date of dividends declared but unpaid on equity securities issued by the entity and outstanding.

diversified.label: Current Deferred Revenue
diversified.description: Amount of deferred income and obligation to transfer product and service to customer for which consideration has been received or is receivable, classified as current.

diversified.label: Current Deferred & Payable Income Tax Liabilities
diversified.description: Represents the current portion of deferred tax liabilities, which result from applying the applicable tax rate to net taxable temporary differences pertaining to each jurisdiction to which the entity is obligated to pay income tax. A current taxable temporary difference is a difference between the tax basis and the carrying amount of a current asset or liability in the financial statements prepared in accordance with generally accepted accounting principles. In a classified statement of financial position, an enterprise separates deferred tax liabilities and assets into a current amount and a noncurrent amount. Deferred tax liabilities and assets are classified as current or noncurrent based on the classification of the related asset or liability for financial reporting. A deferred tax liability or asset that is not related to an asset or liability for financial reporting, including deferred tax assets related to carryforwards, is classified according to the expected reversal date of the temporary difference.

diversified.label: Current Employee Benefit Liabilities
diversified.description: Total of the carrying values as of the balance sheet date of obligations incurred through that date and payable for obligations related to services received from employees, such as accrued salaries and bonuses, payroll taxes and fringe benefits. Used to reflect the current portion of the liabilities (due within one year or within the normal operating cycle if longer).

diversified.label: Other Taxes Payable
diversified.description: Carrying value as of the balance sheet date of obligations incurred and payable for statutory income, sales, use, payroll, excise, real, property and other taxes. Used to reflect the current portion of the liabilities (due within one year or within the normal operating cycle if longer).

diversified.label: Other Current Liabilities
diversified.description: Amount of liabilities classified as other, due within one year or the normal operating cycle, if longer.

diversified.label: Other Current Nonoperating Liabilities
diversified.description: Amount of current liabilities from nonoperating activities, classified as other. Includes accrued liabilities and other liabilities not separately disclosed.

diversified.label: Long-Term Debt
diversified.description: Amount, after deduction of unamortized premium (discount) and debt issuance cost, of long-term debt classified as noncurrent. Excludes lease obligation.

diversified.label: Capital Lease Obligations
diversified.description: Present value of lessee's discounted obligation for lease payments from finance lease.

diversified.label: Operating Lease, Liability, Noncurrent
diversified.description: Present value of lessee's discounted obligation for lease payments from operating lease, classified as noncurrent.

diversified.label: Asset Retirement Reserve & Litigation Obligation
diversified.description: Noncurrent portion of the carrying amount of a liability for an asset retirement obligation. An asset retirement obligation is a legal obligation associated with the disposal or retirement of a tangible long-lived asset that results from the acquisition, construction or development, or the normal operations of a long-lived asset, except for certain obligations of lessees.

diversified.label: Noncurrent Deferred Revenue
diversified.description: Amount of deferred income and obligation to transfer product and service to customer for which consideration has been received or is receivable, classified as noncurrent.

diversified.label: Noncurrent Deferred & Payable Income Tax Liabilities
diversified.description: Amount, after deferred tax asset, of deferred tax liability attributable to taxable differences with jurisdictional netting.

diversified.label: Noncurrent Employee Benefit Liabilities
diversified.description: Amount of liability, recognized in statement of financial position, for defined benefit pension and other postretirement plans, classified as noncurrent.

diversified.label: Other Noncurrent Operating Liabilities
diversified.description: Amount of liabilities classified as other, due after one year or the normal operating cycle, if longer.

diversified.label: Other Noncurrent Nonoperating Liabilities
diversified.description: Amount of noncurrent liabilities from nonoperating activities, classified as other. Includes deferred income taxes and other liabilities not separately disclosed.

diversified.label: Total Liabilities
diversified.description: Amount of liability recognized for present obligation requiring transfer or otherwise providing economic benefit to others.

diversified.label: Commitments & Contingencies
diversified.description: Represents the caption on the face of the balance sheet to indicate that the entity has entered into (1) purchase or supply arrangements that will require expending a portion of its resources to meet the terms thereof, and (2) is exposed to potential losses or, less frequently, gains, arising from (a) possible claims against a company's resources due to future performance under contract terms, and (b) possible losses or likely gains from uncertainties that will ultimately be resolved when one or more future events that are deemed likely to occur do occur or fail to occur.

diversified.label: Redeemable NCI - Common
diversified.description: Equity carrying amount of the common stock component of redeemable NCI.

diversified.label: Redeemable NCI - Preferred
diversified.description: Equity carrying amount of the preferred stock component of redeemable NCI.

diversified.label: Redeemable NCI - Other
diversified.description: Equity carrying amount of the other component of redeemable NCI.

diversified.label: Redeemable Noncontrolling Interest
diversified.description: As of the reporting date, the aggregate carrying amount of all noncontrolling interests which are redeemable by the (parent) entity (1) at a fixed or determinable price on a fixed or determinable date, (2) at the option of the holder of the noncontrolling interest, or (3) upon occurrence of an event that is not solely within the control of the (parent) entity. This item includes noncontrolling interest holder's ownership (or holders' ownership) regardless of the type of equity interest (common, preferred, other) including all potential organizational (legal) forms of the investee entity.

diversified.label: Preferred Stock
diversified.description: Aggregate par or stated value of issued nonredeemable preferred stock (or preferred stock redeemable solely at the option of the issuer). This item includes treasury stock repurchased by the entity. Note: elements for number of nonredeemable preferred shares, par value and other disclosure concepts are in another section within stockholders' equity.

diversified.label: Common Stock
diversified.description: Aggregate par or stated value of issued nonredeemable common stock (or common stock redeemable solely at the option of the issuer). This item includes treasury stock repurchased by the entity. Note: elements for number of nonredeemable common shares, par value and other disclosure concepts are in another section within stockholders' equity.

diversified.label: Additional Paid-In Capital
diversified.description: Value received from shareholders in common stock-related transactions that are in excess of par value or stated value and amounts received from other stock-related transactions. Includes only common stock transactions (excludes preferred stock transactions). May be called contributed capital, capital in excess of par, capital surplus, or paid-in capital.

diversified.label: Retained Earnings
diversified.description: Amount of accumulated undistributed earnings (deficit).

diversified.label: Treasury Stock
diversified.description: The amount allocated to treasury stock. Treasury stock is common and preferred shares of an entity that were issued, repurchased by the entity, and are held in its treasury.

diversified.label: Accumulated Other Comprehensive Income / (Loss)
diversified.description: Amount, after tax, of accumulated increase (decrease) in equity from transaction and other event and circumstance from nonowner source.

diversified.label: Other Equity Adjustments
diversified.description: This element represents movements included in the statement of changes in stockholders' equity which are not separately disclosed or provided for elsewhere in the taxonomy.

diversified.label: Total Common Equity
diversified.description: Amount of equity (deficit) attributable to parent. Excludes temporary equity and equity attributable to noncontrolling interest.

diversified.label: Total Preferred & Common Equity
diversified.description: Amount of equity (deficit) attributable to parent. Excludes temporary equity and equity attributable to noncontrolling interest.

diversified.label: Noncontrolling Interest
diversified.description: Amount of equity (deficit) attributable to noncontrolling interest. Excludes temporary equity.

diversified.label: Total Equity & Noncontrolling Interests
diversified.description: Amount of equity (deficit) attributable to parent and noncontrolling interest. Excludes temporary equity.

diversified.label: Temporary Equity Attributable to Parent
diversified.description: Carrying amount of temporary equity attributable to parent.

diversified.label: Temporary Equity
diversified.description: Carrying amount of the equity component of securities that are redeemable.

diversified.label: Total Liabilities & Shareholders' Equity
diversified.description: Amount of liabilities and equity items, including the portion of equity attributable to noncontrolling interests, if any.

insurance.label: Cash and Due from Banks
insurance.description: Amount of cash and cash equivalent. Cash includes, but is not limited to, currency on hand, demand deposit with financial institution, and account with general characteristic of demand deposit. Cash equivalent includes, but is not limited to, short-term, highly liquid investment that is both readily convertible to known amount of cash and so near maturity that it presents insignificant risk of change in value because of change in interest rate.

insurance.label: Restricted Cash
insurance.description: Amount of cash restricted as to withdrawal or usage. Cash includes, but is not limited to, currency on hand, demand deposits with banks or financial institutions, and other accounts with general characteristics of demand deposits.

insurance.label: Short-term Investments
insurance.description: Amount of investments including trading securities, available-for-sale securities, held-to-maturity securities, and short-term investments classified as other and current.

insurance.label: Federal Funds Sold
insurance.description: Includes: (1) the amount outstanding of funds lent to other depository institutions, securities brokers, or securities dealers in the form of Federal Funds sold; for example, immediately available funds lent under agreements or contracts that mature in one business day or roll over under a continuing contract, regardless of the nature of the transaction or the collateral involved, excluding overnight lending for commercial and industrial purposes. Also include Federal Funds sold under agreements to resell on a gross basis, excluding (1) sales of term Federal Funds, (2) due bills representing purchases of securities or other assets by the reporting bank that have not yet been delivered and similar instruments, (3) resale agreements that mature in more than one business day involving assets other than securities, and (4) yield maintenance dollar repurchase agreements (Federal Funds Sold) and (2) the dollar amount outstanding of funds lent in the form of security resale agreements regardless of maturity, if the agreement requires the bank to resell the identical security purchased or a security that meets the definition of substantially the same in the case of a dollar roll. Also include purchases of participations in pools of securities, regardless of maturity (Securities Purchased Under Agreements to Re-sell).

insurance.label: Interest Bearing Deposits at Other Banks
insurance.description: For banks and other depository institutions (including Federal Reserve Banks, if applicable): Interest-bearing deposits in other financial institutions for relatively short periods of time including, for example, certificates of deposits, which are presented separately from cash on the balance sheet.

insurance.label: Time Deposits Placed and Other Short-Term Investments
insurance.description: Amount of time deposit liabilities, including certificates of deposit.

insurance.label: Trading Account Securities
insurance.description: Amount of investment in debt security measured at fair value with change in fair value recognized in net income (trading) and investment in equity security measured at fair value with change in fair value recognized in net income (FV-NI).

insurance.label: Loans and Leases
insurance.description: Amortized cost excluding accrued interest, before allowance for credit loss, of financing receivable. Excludes net investment in lease.

insurance.label: Allowance for Loan and Lease Losses
insurance.description: Amount of allowance for credit loss on financing receivable. Excludes allowance for financing receivable covered under loss sharing agreement.

insurance.label: Loans and Leases, Net of Allowance
insurance.description: Amortized cost excluding accrued interest, after allowance for credit loss, of financing receivable. Excludes net investment in lease.

insurance.label: Loans Held for Sale
insurance.description: Amount before allowance and after deduction of deferred interest and fees, unamortized costs and premiums and discounts from face amounts, of loans and leases held in portfolio, including but not limited to, commercial and consumer loans. Excludes loans and leases covered under loss sharing agreements.

insurance.label: Accrued Investment Income
insurance.description: Interest, dividends, rents, ancillary and other revenues earned but not yet received by the entity on its investments.

insurance.label: Accounts Receivable
insurance.description: Amount due from customers for goods/services in the normal course of business.

insurance.label: Customer and Other Receivables
insurance.description: Amount, after allowance for credit loss, of right to consideration from customer for product sold and service rendered in normal course of business.

insurance.label: Premises and Equipment, Net
insurance.description: Amount, after accumulated depreciation, depletion, and amortization, of property, plant, and equipment. Includes, but is not limited to, land and land improvement; building; machinery and equipment; furniture and fixture; and work of art, historical treasure, or similar asset classified as collection.

insurance.label: Property, Plant and Equipment, Net
insurance.description: Amount after accumulated depreciation, depletion and amortization of physical assets.

insurance.label: Operating Lease, Right-of-Use Asset
insurance.description: Amount of lessee's right to use underlying asset under operating lease.

insurance.label: Finance Lease, Right-of-Use Asset
insurance.description: Amount, after accumulated amortization, of right-of-use asset from finance lease.

insurance.label: Mortgage Servicing Rights
insurance.description: Fair value of an asset representing net future revenue from contractually specified servicing fees, late charges, and other ancillary revenues, in excess of future costs related to servicing arrangements.

insurance.label: Long-term Investments
insurance.description: Amount of long-term investments including equity method investees and available for sale securities.

insurance.label: Deferred Acquisition Cost
insurance.description: Amount of deferred policy acquisition cost capitalized on contract remaining in force.

insurance.label: Separate Account Business Assets
insurance.description: Amount of asset at fair value held for benefit of separate account policyholder.

insurance.label: Goodwill
insurance.description: Amount, after accumulated impairment loss, of asset representing future economic benefit arising from other asset acquired in business combination or from joint venture formation or both, that is not individually identified and separately recognized.

insurance.label: Intangible Assets
insurance.description: Amount, after accumulated amortization, of finite- and indefinite-lived intangible assets and capitalized cost for software to be sold, leased, or marketed. Excludes goodwill.

insurance.label: Other Assets
insurance.description: Amount of assets classified as other.

insurance.label: Other Than Fixed Noncurrent Assets
insurance.description: Noncurrent assets other than investments and PP&E.

insurance.label: Total Assets
insurance.description: Amount of asset recognized for present right to economic benefit.

insurance.label: Non-Interest Bearing Deposits
insurance.description: The aggregate amount of all domestic and foreign noninterest-bearing deposits liabilities held by the entity.

insurance.label: Interest Bearing Deposits
insurance.description: The aggregate of all domestic and foreign interest-bearing deposit liabilities.

insurance.label: Federal Funds Purchased and Securities Sold
insurance.description: Amount after offset of short term borrowing where a bank borrows, at the federal funds rate, from another bank and securities that an entity sells and agrees to repurchase at a specified date for a specified price.

insurance.label: Short-Term Debt
insurance.description: Reflects the total carrying amount as of the balance sheet date of debt having initial terms less than one year or the normal operating cycle, if longer.

insurance.label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt
insurance.description: Amount of long-term debt due within one year or within the normal operating cycle, if longer.

insurance.label: Operating Lease, Liability, Current
insurance.description: Present value of lessee's discounted obligation for lease payments from operating lease, classified as current.

insurance.label: Finance Lease, Liability, Current
insurance.description: Present value of lessee's discounted obligation for lease payments from finance lease, classified as current.

insurance.label: Bankers Acceptance Outstanding
insurance.description: Amount of short-term, negotiable time drafts drawn on and accepted by a financial institution. Bankers acceptances are a bank's promise to pay to the holder of the draft a stated amount on a specified date.

insurance.label: Accounts Payable
insurance.description: Amount of obligations incurred and payable for goods and services received.

insurance.label: Accrued Interest Payable
insurance.description: Carrying value as of the balance sheet date of [accrued] interest payable on all forms of debt, including trade payables, that has been incurred and is unpaid. Used to reflect the current portion of the liabilities (due within one year or within the normal operating cycle if longer).

insurance.label: Other Short-Term Payables
insurance.description: Amount of borrowings classified as other, maturing within one year or the normal operating cycle, if longer.

insurance.label: Long-Term Debt
insurance.description: Amount, after deduction of unamortized premium (discount) and debt issuance cost, of long-term debt classified as noncurrent. Excludes lease obligation.

insurance.label: Capital Lease Obligations
insurance.description: Present value of lessee's discounted obligation for lease payments from finance lease.

insurance.label: Operating Lease, Liability, Noncurrent
insurance.description: Present value of lessee's discounted obligation for lease payments from operating lease, classified as noncurrent.

insurance.label: Claims and Claim Expense
insurance.description: The amount needed to reflect the estimated ultimate cost of settling claims relating to insured events that have occurred on or before the balance sheet date, whether or not reported to the insurer at that date.

insurance.label: Future Policy Benefits
insurance.description: Amount, before effect of reinsurance, of present value of future benefit to be paid to or on behalf of policyholder and related expense less present value of future net premium receivable under insurance contract.

insurance.label: Unearned Premiums Liability
insurance.description: Carrying amount of premiums written on insurance contracts that have not been earned as of the balance sheet date.

insurance.label: Policy Holder Funds
insurance.description: Amount due to policyholders for funds held that are returnable under the terms of insurance contracts, classified as other.

insurance.label: Participating Policy Holder Equity
insurance.description: Amount due to policyholders for funds held that are returnable under the terms of insurance contracts, classified as other.

insurance.label: Separate Account Business Liabilities
insurance.description: Amount of liability for variable contract in which all or portion of contract holder's funds is allocated to specific separate account and supported by assets held in separate account.

insurance.label: Other Long-Term Liabilities
insurance.description: Amount of liabilities classified as other, due after one year or the normal operating cycle, if longer.

insurance.label: Total Liabilities
insurance.description: Amount of liability recognized for present obligation requiring transfer or otherwise providing economic benefit to others.

insurance.label: Commitments & Contingencies
insurance.description: Represents the caption on the face of the balance sheet to indicate that the entity has entered into (1) purchase or supply arrangements that will require expending a portion of its resources to meet the terms thereof, and (2) is exposed to potential losses or, less frequently, gains, arising from (a) possible claims against a company's resources due to future performance under contract terms, and (b) possible losses or likely gains from uncertainties that will ultimately be resolved when one or more future events that are deemed likely to occur do occur or fail to occur.

insurance.label: Redeemable NCI - Common
insurance.description: Equity carrying amount of the common stock component of redeemable NCI.

insurance.label: Redeemable NCI - Preferred
insurance.description: Equity carrying amount of the preferred stock component of redeemable NCI.

insurance.label: Redeemable NCI - Other
insurance.description: Equity carrying amount of the other component of redeemable NCI.

insurance.label: Redeemable Noncontrolling Interest
insurance.description: As of the reporting date, the aggregate carrying amount of all noncontrolling interests which are redeemable by the (parent) entity (1) at a fixed or determinable price on a fixed or determinable date, (2) at the option of the holder of the noncontrolling interest, or (3) upon occurrence of an event that is not solely within the control of the (parent) entity. This item includes noncontrolling interest holder's ownership (or holders' ownership) regardless of the type of equity interest (common, preferred, other) including all potential organizational (legal) forms of the investee entity.

insurance.label: Preferred Stock
insurance.description: Aggregate par or stated value of issued nonredeemable preferred stock (or preferred stock redeemable solely at the option of the issuer). This item includes treasury stock repurchased by the entity. Note: elements for number of nonredeemable preferred shares, par value and other disclosure concepts are in another section within stockholders' equity.

insurance.label: Common Stock
insurance.description: Aggregate par or stated value of issued nonredeemable common stock (or common stock redeemable solely at the option of the issuer). This item includes treasury stock repurchased by the entity. Note: elements for number of nonredeemable common shares, par value and other disclosure concepts are in another section within stockholders' equity.

insurance.label: Additional Paid-In Capital
insurance.description: Value received from shareholders in common stock-related transactions that are in excess of par value or stated value and amounts received from other stock-related transactions. Includes only common stock transactions (excludes preferred stock transactions). May be called contributed capital, capital in excess of par, capital surplus, or paid-in capital.

insurance.label: Retained Earnings
insurance.description: Amount of accumulated undistributed earnings (deficit).

insurance.label: Treasury Stock
insurance.description: The amount allocated to treasury stock. Treasury stock is common and preferred shares of an entity that were issued, repurchased by the entity, and are held in its treasury.

insurance.label: Accumulated Other Comprehensive Income / (Loss)
insurance.description: Amount, after tax, of accumulated increase (decrease) in equity from transaction and other event and circumstance from nonowner source.

insurance.label: Other Equity Adjustments
insurance.description: This element represents movements included in the statement of changes in stockholders' equity which are not separately disclosed or provided for elsewhere in the taxonomy.

insurance.label: Total Common Equity
insurance.description: Amount of equity (deficit) attributable to parent. Excludes temporary equity and equity attributable to noncontrolling interest.

insurance.label: Total Preferred & Common Equity
insurance.description: Amount of equity (deficit) attributable to parent. Excludes temporary equity and equity attributable to noncontrolling interest.

insurance.label: Noncontrolling Interest
insurance.description: Amount of equity (deficit) attributable to noncontrolling interest. Excludes temporary equity.

insurance.label: Total Equity & Noncontrolling Interests
insurance.description: Amount of equity (deficit) attributable to parent and noncontrolling interest. Excludes temporary equity.

insurance.label: Temporary Equity Attributable to Parent
insurance.description: Carrying amount of temporary equity attributable to parent.

insurance.label: Temporary Equity
insurance.description: Carrying amount of the equity component of securities that are redeemable.

insurance.label: Total Liabilities & Shareholders' Equity
insurance.description: Amount of liabilities and equity items, including the portion of equity attributable to noncontrolling interests, if any.
